title: aconitum laeve
intro: Aconitum laeve, also known as the smooth monk's hood or Chinese aconitum, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It belongs to the Aconitum genus, which is known for its toxic compounds, but also possesses medicinal properties. The plant contains aconitine, a powerful alkaloid with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for treating pain, fever, and rheumatism. In traditional Chinese medicine, Aconitum laeve is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is used to promote digestion, relieve nausea, and boost the immune system.
